checkin.journal:
Feeling tired, depressed but not a single yawning - how is this possible

My area around coccyx and colon feels even more irritated after gym - i feel pain when muscles strech when I am starting to pass the stool

- horrible bloating was passing gas for 3 hours at least 40 times if not more - smelly
Slight discomfort, feeling tightness on palpation left top stomach quadrant under ribs and going down to 2 cm from belly button. It feels the whole area is very tight
